instruction: Handle the budget email thread in the inbox first. Then check the Tokyo board and calendar; right now the next step is already on the board, and if it only needs async follow-up, leave the calendar alone, so add only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send finance@example.com a quick note.
canonical_instruction: The budget email thread in the inbox needs attention today. Then check the Tokyo board and calendar; right now the next step is already on the board, and if it only needs async follow-up, leave the calendar alone, so fill only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send finance@example.com a quick update.

solution_commands: file create --path '/handoff/tokyo-budget-followup.txt' --content 'Tokyo budget follow-up handoff note.'
email send --to finance@example.com --subject 'Budget follow-up for Tokyo' --body 'Tracking the next step for Tokyo.'
